text_original: great app but don't know what pictures are rated
text_zh: 很棒的应用，但不知道哪些照片被评分了
reply_original: Hi! Glad you like the app. Regarding pictures, we strictly follow Google Play policies, so content must remain within safety guidelines (no nudity or explicit imagery). If you encounter specific issues or have suggestions about the rating system, please email us at support@fantachat.ai. We'd love to help you further!
reply_zh: 嗨！很高兴你喜欢这款应用。关于图片，我们严格遵守 Google Play 的政策，因此内容必须符合安全准则（不得包含裸露或露骨图像）。如果你遇到具体问题或对分级系统有建议，请发送邮件至 support@fantachat.ai。我们很乐意为你提供进一步帮助！
